data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$113.913 billion, with a cumulative net inflow of US$40.207 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 12, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$251 million. Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of US$6.9162 million, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$21.959 billion. Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net inflow of US$16.3424 million, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.253 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$113.913 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.92%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$40.207 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value is $10.114 billion, with a cumulative net inflow of $3.128 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 12, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 40.948 million US dollars. 
Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 30.226 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 3.978 billion US dollars. 
Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 612 million US dollars. 
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 10.114 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.13%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.128 billion US dollars.

data.title: Gate.io will launch HEI perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will launch Heima (HEI) perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 16:00 (UTC+8) on February 13, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies, and is the preferred platform for more than 21 million users worldwide.

data.title: Blum Secures $5M to Expand AI Trading on Telegram
data.description:
Blum raises $5M to enhance its AI-powered Telegram trading platform, expanding multichain support and solidifying its lead in the TON ecosystem.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/blum-secures-5m-to-expand-ai-trading-on-telegram

data.title: European Central Bank May Implement Three More Rate Cuts This Year
data.description:
According to Odaily, European Central Bank (ECB) Governing Council member Vujcic has indicated that the ECB might implement three more interest rate cuts this year. This comes even as the U.S. Federal Reserve slows its pace of rate reductions. The continuation of the ECB's easing policy is contingent upon a rapid decline in core inflation. Since June of last year, the ECB has reduced borrowing costs five times and has signaled further policy easing, prompting investor speculation about the speed and extent of future rate cuts.

Vujcic stated, "The market expects three more rate cuts this year. These expectations are not unreasonable." However, he emphasized that data in the coming months will be crucial, as forecasts suggest a significant drop in inflation within the services sector. This sector represents the largest single component of the consumer price basket and has been a major driver of excessive price growth over the past year.

"For rate cuts to materialize, we need to see a slowdown in core inflation and services inflation," Vujcic, who is considered a moderate hawk, remarked.

data.title: Sora Ventures takes over board control of HK Asia Holdings, a Hong Kong-listed company
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sora Ventures and its affiliates took over control of the board of directors of HK Asia Holdings, a Hong Kong-listed company focused on Bitcoin, after submitting director appointment documents. The document, which takes effect on February 12, 2025, marks the company's transition from holding shares to assuming management responsibilities for the company.
The new board consists of 12 directors, covering executive, non-executive and independent non-executive positions. The document lists David Bailey and John Riggins of Bitcoin Magazine owner BTC Inc., Jason Fang of Sora Ventures, Siu Muk Lung (Chairman), Chung Chi Fai and Mary Wong as executive directors.
The board structure includes four committees, namely audit, compensation, nomination, and environment, society and governance, and designated roles include committee chairmen and members.
(CryptoSlate)

data.title: ECB official: ECB can keep cutting rates even if Fed slows down
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ECB board member Vujcic said the ECB may cut interest rates three more times this year, even if the Fed slows down its rate cuts, but the premise of easing policy is a rapid decline in underlying inflation. Since June last year, the ECB has cut borrowing costs five times and hinted at further easing, which has left investors speculating on the speed and extent of further rate cuts. "The market expects three more rate cuts this year," Vujcic said. "These expectations are not unreasonable." However, data in the coming months will be crucial as forecasts expect a sharp drop in service sector inflation. Service sector inflation is the largest single component of the consumer price basket and a key driver of excessive price growth over the past year. "For rate cuts to become a reality, we need to see a slowdown in core inflation and service sector inflation," said Vujcic, who is seen as a moderate hawk. (Jinshi)

data.title: Texas Senator Resubmits Bill Seeking Investment in Bitcoin or Cryptocurrency with Market Cap of at Least $500 Billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Texas Senator Charles Schwertner resubmitted the state's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Act, allowing the state to invest in Bitcoin or cryptocurrencies with a market value of at least $500 billion without purchase restrictions.
Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick previously announced that the state's SBR bill will be one of the Senate's 40 priority bills for 2025.

data.title: Paradigm CTO: Reth v1.2 has been released, and more features such as L2 support will be launched soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paradigm CTO Georgios Konstantopoulos posted on X: "Reth v1.2 has been released, Pectra is ready, L1 usage performance has been improved by up to 50%, and the default gas limit is 36M. This version is groundbreaking, marking the beginning of our launch of a new high-efficiency consensus engine and optimizations that were not possible before. More features are coming soon, including L2 support."

data.title: Binance Finance, One-click Coin Purchase, Flash Exchange, Leverage, and Contracts will be launched on Heima (HEI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Financial Management, One-Click Coin Buying, Flash Exchange Trading Platform, Leverage, Fixed Investment Platform and Binance Contract will launch Heima (HEI) according to the timeline listed below: 
Binance Financial Management HEI Principal Guaranteed Earning Coin Current Product will be launched on Binance Principal Guaranteed Earning Coin Platform and open for subscription at 16:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 13, 2025; From 18:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 14, 2025, users can purchase HEI through any payment method supported by Binance Fixed Investment. 
Binance Leveraged Coin Security Warehouse and Position-by-Position Leverage will add HEI borrowable assets at 19:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 13, 2025, as well as HEI/USDT, HEI/USDC full-position and position-by-position leverage trading pairs. Binance VIP 7-VIP 9 users can borrow the above assets in full-margin and isolated-margin leverage about 30 minutes before the above assets are officially launched on Binance Margin.
